seoTitle: Charlestown vs Charlotte Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Charlestown and Charlotte Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Charlestown vs Charlotte Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Charlestown and Charlotte Bay.
heading: Charlestown vs Charlotte Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Charlestown, New South Wales and Charlotte Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Charlestown has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Charlotte Bay (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Charlestown or Charlotte Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Charlestown has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Charlotte Bay scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Charlestown scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Charlotte Bay scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Charlestown or Charlotte Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Charlestown has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
